title: Clean a Messy Dataset
description: Plan the cleaning a dataset needs before analysis.
content:
Here's a description of my dataset: {{dataset}}

Walk me through cleaning it. Identify likely problems: missing values, duplicates, inconsistent units or formats, outliers, and encoding issues. For each, the detection check and the decision to make (drop, impute, flag) with its bias risk. Insist I record every transformation so the cleaning is reproducible. Tell me which problems would most distort my eventual conclusion.
